title: centipeda orbicularis var. minuta
intro: Centipeda orbicularis var. minuta, also known as Small White Flower or Chinese Cudweed, is a perennial herb in the daisy family native to Australia and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and calm the skin. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Centipeda orbicularis var. minuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing users to harness its medicinal properties in various forms.
